summary: CelebrateNewPage (/celebrate-new) Gold Standard sandbox page tested. All 12 features pass. Tab-based navigation with URL query params working. Category-specific filters (city for Cakes, breed pills for Breed-Cakes, Build Hamper CTA for Hampers) all functional. OccasionBoxBuilder and PartyPlanningWizard modals open correctly. Product grid shows 2x2 on mobile, 4-col on desktop. Quick Add (+) button adds to cart successfully.

issues: Console warning: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for accessibility - recommend adding aria-describedby

critical_code_review_comments: CelebrateNewPage.jsx: Well-structured with data-testid attributes on all tabs and occasion boxes
URL query param updates work correctly via useSearchParams hook (line 458-472)
Tab-specific content renders conditionally (city filter for cakes line 718, breed pills for breed-cakes line 707)
Product filtering works client-side in getFilteredProducts() (lines 541-572)
OccasionBoxBuilder properly fetches templates from API (/api/occasion-boxes/by-occasion/{type})
seed_data_creation: None - used existing celebrate pillar products
context_for_next_testing_agent: CelebrateNewPage is the Gold Standard sandbox page at /celebrate-new. It uses swipable tabs that update URL query params. Key data-testids: tab-{id} (all, cakes, breed-cakes, pupcakes, treats, hampers, accessories), occasion-box-{type} (birthday, gotcha_day, graduation, party), plan-party-btn, build-box-btn, quick-add-btn. Products API: /api/products?pillar=celebrate&limit=200. OccasionBox templates API: /api/occasion-boxes/by-occasion/{type}.

features_tested.page_loads: PASS - Hero section and all components render
features_tested.category_tabs: PASS - All 7 tabs found with data-testid
features_tested.url_query_params: PASS - URL updates to ?category={tab_id} on tab click
features_tested.all_tab_occasion_boxes: PASS - 4 occasion box buttons with data-testid
features_tested.breed_cakes_tab_breed_pills: PASS - Labrador, Golden Retriever, Pug, Beagle, Husky pills found
features_tested.hampers_tab_build_cta: PASS - 'Build Your Own Hamper' CTA found
features_tested.quick_add_button: PASS - Adds product to cart, toast shown
features_tested.build_box_modal: PASS - OccasionBoxBuilder opens with 4 product categories

console_warnings: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for accessibility in OccasionBoxBuilder
Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent
